nasb.text: Then Joab arose, came to Absalom at his house and said to him, “Why have your servants set my field on fire?”

esv.text: Then Joab arose and went to Absalom at his house and said to him, “Why have your servants set my field on fire?”

cnv.text: 於是約押起來，到了押沙龍的家，問他：“你的僕人為甚麼放火燒了我那塊田呢？”

ccb.text: 约押便来到押沙龙家里，问他：“你为什么叫仆人放火烧我的田？”
